name: @whynothugo/pi-notify
description: Pi extension to emit a terminal bell when the agent ends its turn.
readme:
# pi-notify

pi-coding-agent extension to notify when the agent's turn has ended.

## Installation

Install with:

```sh
pi install https://git.sr.ht/~whynothugo/pi-notify
```

## Overview

Simply emits a terminal bell. The compositor should highlight the window as
urgent or some equivalent.
